title: eMKay® 150Pcs Heavy Duty Reusable Clear Cutlery Set [ 50 Spoons, 50 Forks, 50 Knives Set ] Perfect for for Birthday Parties Buffets Picnics BBQ's Weddings Camping
features: ✅CUTLERY SET CONTAINS: - Includes 50x forks, 50x spoons, 50x knives.
✅PREMIUM HEAVYWEIGHT STRONG MATERIAL: - Enjoy any food, from soup to steak, using our sturdy & durable plastic forks, knives and spoons.
✅CRYSTAL CLEAR WITH MODERN DESIGN - Simple but elegant plastic tableware, suitable for a birthday party, cafes, hospitals and much more.
✅HIGH QUALITY - Every cutlery piece we manufacture passes rigorous quality testing, which is partly why our products are so popular with business customers.
✅RECYCLABLE AND WASHABLE - The dinnerware is re-usable too. Completely free of harmful toxins and coatings, so you can wash and re-use the cutlery again and again.
✅FOOD SAFE: Heavyweight REUSABLE Cutlery are BPA FREE for food safety, superior strength, and durability.
✅MULTIPLE USE: Ideal travel cutlery set also for parties, to-go lunches, as well as home and office use.
✅EVENTS & PARTIES: Perfect for daily use or large catered gatherings or events, such as parties, birthdays and banquets and every day use.
description: Product Description eMKay Clear Silverware - Forks, Spoons and Knives Durable & Break-Resistant: Crafted from high-quality and heavy-duty material that resists bending, cracking, or snapping—ideal for both casual and formal use. Comfortable Grip: Ergonomic, easy-to-hold handles with smooth edges for a safe, comfortable, and pleasant dining experience. Sleek & Clear Design: Elegant transparent look complements any decor, tableware, or party theme—perfect for weddings, birthdays, and holidays. Bulk Value Pack: Includes 150 pieces / 300 pieces of premium clear cutlery—forks, knives, and spoons—giving you plenty for large gatherings, events, or stocking up at home. Dishwasher & Microwave Safe: Built to handle heat—reusable and easy to clean, saving you time and money. BPA-Free & Food Safe: Made from non-toxic and BPA-free material, use with hot or cold foods. Convenient for Any Occasion: Perfect for catering, food trucks, office lunches, outdoor events, or everyday meals at home.
